findings.message: Target PR #1 changed exactly the approved five starter files and no extra files.
evidence: GitHub PR file list: README.md, package.json, index.html, src/styles.css, src/main.js
Local temp clone file-scope scan found no missing or extra files.

findings.message: Code-file safety scan found no credentials, tracking scripts, live form wiring, external APIs, deployment config, or paid integrations.
evidence: Code-file safety scan returned zero hits for credential, tracking, liveForm, externalApi, netlifyN8nDeployConfig, and paidIntegration patterns.
README safety-boundary language explicitly blocks future deployment, hosting, form handling, analytics, or integrations without separate owner approval.

findings.message: The starter meets the approved lightweight construction website scope, but future owner-approved polish should replace placeholder/general copy with real brand, proof, photos, and contact path.
evidence: index.html includes homepage hero, services, process, contact CTA, and static safety copy.
src/styles.css provides responsive styling and no external assets.
The contact CTA remains static and does not submit, call, email, or connect to a live service.
findings.optionalImprovement: Before any staging or production milestone, owner should approve real business content, imagery, contact method, and staging checks.

findings.message: Safe local checks passed without dependency installation.
evidence: npm.cmd run check passed with Static starter file check passed.
package.json has no dependencies or devDependencies.

optionalImprovements: Before staging, replace generic construction copy with owner-approved business positioning, proof points, and imagery.
Before adding contact capture, require a separate approval gate for forms, CRM, automation, email, phone, or analytics.
Before merging target PR #1, require separate owner-approved merge gate under AG OS.
limitations: Critique is advisory only and cannot approve, merge, or deploy the target pull request.
Review did not run browser visual regression because the target repo is a static starter with no browser test harness.
Review did not poll target repo CI or alter target repository settings.
